comment: GAAP net revenue increased 97.6% YoY.
Adjusted net revenue increased 91.8% YoY.
GAAP net income turned positive; includes $6.9M income tax benefit.
GAAP margin improved materially, but tax benefit and fair-value items should be separated from operating quality.
MarketBeat consensus EPS was $0.17; beat was $0.01.
Adjusted EBITDA increased 191.8% YoY.
Margin expansion was a core positive signal.
Ecosystem volume increased 135.8% YoY.
Consumer Loan Marketplace volume increased 112.6% YoY.
Figure Connect volume increased 237.3% YoY and reached 56% of Consumer Loan Marketplace volume.
Take rate expanded 20 bps; management says mix may pressure take rate as first-lien and lower-capital-intensity products scale.
Reported on call; first-lien growth expands TAM but can lower take rate.
Company added 80 partners in Q1 and ended the quarter with 387 active partners.
YLDS scaled rapidly from early 2025 launch.
End-of-quarter balance; product still early but scaling.
Cash excluding restricted cash rose from Dec. 31, 2025.
Restricted cash disclosed on unaudited balance sheet.
Balance sheet loan exposure increased.
Total assets increased sequentially.
Liabilities increased with current and related-party debt.
Equity base modestly higher sequentially.
Company initiated one-quarter-forward volume guidance.
Midpoint implies roughly 36% sequential growth versus Q1 volume.
April volume was up 12% versus March 2026 and 108% YoY versus April 2025.
April matched offers rose 4% versus March.
